wiki.summary: “Rose Colored“ is a song about seeing a relationship as better than it actually is, in this case through rose colored glasses. Through Joji’s perspective in the chorus he is seen feeling unsure about the current relationship he’s in and putting and end to it. With Heat’s part he’s seen talking about a life of partying and gambling as a way to pass the time and avoid getting closer to the person he’s with. Read more on Last.fm.
